mafia.name: Double Agent
mafia.description: You work for the enemy. Eliminate operatives at night while maintaining your cover during debriefings.

doctor.name: Field Medic
doctor.description: Deploy your extraction kit each night to save one operative from elimination. You cannot extract yourself two nights in a row.

detective.name: Intelligence Analyst
detective.description: Access classified files each night to uncover the true allegiance of one operative.

civilian.name: Field Operative
civilian.description: Root out the double agents during debriefings. Trust your instincts and watch for inconsistencies.

jester.name: Rogue Agent
jester.description: You have gone off the grid. Win by getting discharged during a debriefing. Act suspicious enough to draw attention.

nightMessages: Mission control goes dark. Operatives, stand by for nightfall protocol...
Encrypted channels open. The double agents make their move...
HQ powers down. Only shadows and secrets remain...
Night shift begins. Someone in this room is not who they claim to be...
The surveillance feeds cut to static. Danger lurks in the facility...
Classified operations are underway. All operatives, maintain radio silence...
The bunker lights dim. Trust no one in the darkness...
A coded transmission crackles through the static. The night op begins...
dayMessages: Morning debriefing commences. All operatives, report to the situation room.
The alarm sounds. HQ is back online. Time to review last night's events.
Daylight protocol activated. Someone did not survive the night shift...
The briefing room fills with tension. Intelligence reports are in.
Secure channels reopen. The team assembles, but trust is fractured.
All operatives are summoned. Last night's mission had casualties...
The director calls an emergency meeting. Suspicions are running high.
Debriefing begins. The evidence board awaits new connections.
